title: lasthenia glabrata
intro: Lasthenia glabrata, also known as the Madroña or Yellow Dungdaisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various ailments such as wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lasthenia glabrata include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible antifungal and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of Lasthenia glabrata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
